posts.text:
Hey, as you know @jordanbpeterson has been really sick. A lot of people have been asking for updates so here’s one. He’s recovering slowly day by day but I won't lie, it's slow and scary. He won't be back for another few months at least, probably longer. We’re not entirely sure what’s going on but it looks like possibly severe CIRS and a LOT of bad luck. Or we’re getting spiritually attacked. Or both. 

To be perfectly honest, I think a lot of this is spiritual. My newborn Audrey almost died of

Most universities demand rote memorization and ideological compliance.

At Peterson Academy, you're invited into disciplined dialogue—with the greatest minds of our time.

We now offer over 52 in-depth, 8-hour courses—with 4 more added monthly. They’re designed to teach you how to think, not what to think.

posts.text:
Happy Birthday to Thomas Sowell


Peter Robinson (@p_m_robinson)

THOMAS SOWELL AT 95. With Tom and Mary Sowell at Tom's birthday luncheon this very day, my wife and yours truly. Happy birthday to a genuinely great man!




— https://nitter.net/p_m_robinson/status/1939814242196365606#m
